message:
Subject: Software Engineer Opportunity at TechCorp

From: recruiter@techcorp.com

Hi,

I came across your profile and was impressed by your experience. We have an opening for a Senior Software Engineer that I think would be a great fit. The role involves working with Python, FastAPI, and modern AI technologies.

Would you be interested in learning more? I'd love to schedule a quick call this week.

Best regards,
Sarah Johnson
TechCorp Recruiting

Subject: Networking Opportunity

From: john.doe@startup.io

Hello,

I saw your work on LangGraph and thought you might be interested in connecting. I'm building a similar product and would love to exchange ideas.

Are you available for a coffee chat next week?

Thanks,
John

Subject: Re: Your Application

From: hr@bigtech.com

Thank you for applying to our Software Engineer position. We'd like to invite you to the next round of interviews.

Please let us know your availability for the following dates:
- Monday, Dec 18, 2-4 PM
- Wednesday, Dec 20, 10 AM-12 PM
- Friday, Dec 22, 1-3 PM

Looking forward to hearing from you.

HR Team

Subject: Meeting Request

From: colleague@company.com

Hi,

Can we schedule a meeting to discuss the Q4 project? I'm free Tuesday afternoon or Wednesday morning.

Let me know what works for you.

Thanks!

Subject: Calendar Invite - Project Review

From: manager@company.com

Hi Team,

I'd like to schedule a project review meeting. Please respond with your availability for next week.

Best,
Manager

Subject: Reschedule Meeting

From: client@clientco.com

Hi,

I need to reschedule our meeting from Thursday to Friday. Same time (2 PM) if that works for you.

Sorry for the inconvenience.

Best,
Client

Subject: Interview Scheduling

From: interviews@company.com

Hello,

We'd like to schedule your technical interview. Please choose from:
- Monday, 10 AM
- Tuesday, 2 PM
- Wednesday, 11 AM

Reply with your preference.

Thanks!

Subject: Assignment Due Date Extension

From: professor@university.edu

Dear Students,

Due to the technical issues with the submission system, I'm extending the deadline for Assignment 3 to Friday, December 15th at 11:59 PM.

Please submit your work through the course portal.

Prof. Smith

Subject: Office Hours This Week

From: ta@university.edu

Hi,

I'll be holding office hours this week on Wednesday from 2-4 PM. Feel free to drop by if you have questions about the midterm.

See you then!
TA

Subject: Grade Inquiry

From: student@university.edu

Hi Professor,

I have a question about my grade on the last assignment. Could we discuss this during your office hours?

Thanks,
Student

Subject: Course Registration

From: registrar@university.edu

Dear Student,

Your course registration for Spring 2024 is now open. Please complete your registration by December 20th.

Registrar Office

Subject: Technical Issue with Login

From: user@example.com

Hi Support,

I'm having trouble logging into my account. I keep getting an error message. Can you help?

Thanks!

Subject: Feature Request

From: customer@company.com

Hello,

I'd love to see a dark mode option in the app. Is this something you're planning to add?

Thanks for the great product!
Customer

Subject: Bug Report

From: developer@startup.com

Hi,

I found a bug where the export function doesn't work on mobile devices. Steps to reproduce:
1. Open app on mobile
2. Click export
3. Nothing happens

Can you fix this?

Thanks!

Subject: Account Recovery

From: user@email.com

Hi,

I forgot my password and the reset link isn't working. Can you help me recover my account?

Thanks!

Subject: Invoice #12345

From: billing@service.com

Dear Customer,

Your invoice for December 2023 is ready. Amount due: $99.00

Please pay by December 31st to avoid late fees.

Thank you!
Billing Team

Subject: Payment Received

From: payments@company.com

Hi,

We've received your payment of $150.00. Thank you!

Your subscription is active through January 2024.

Best,
Payments Team

Subject: Subscription Renewal

From: billing@saas.com

Hello,

Your subscription is set to renew on January 1st. The charge will be $49.99.

If you'd like to cancel, please do so before December 28th.

Thanks!

Subject: Refund Request

From: customer@business.com

Hi,

I'd like to request a refund for my recent purchase. Order #7890. The product didn't meet my expectations.

Thanks,
Customer

Subject: Weekend Plans

From: friend@email.com

Hey!

Want to grab coffee this weekend? I'm free Saturday afternoon.

Let me know!
Friend

Subject: Happy Holidays!

From: family@email.com

Hi,

Just wanted to wish you happy holidays! Hope you're doing well.

Love,
Family

Subject: Catching Up

From: oldfriend@email.com

Hi there,

Long time no talk! How have you been? Would love to catch up soon.

Take care!

Subject: URGENT: Claim Your Prize Now!

From: winner@spam.com

Congratulations! You've won $1,000,000! Click here to claim your prize immediately!

[Link removed]

Subject: Limited Time Offer - 90% Off!

From: deals@spam.com

Don't miss this amazing deal! Get 90% off on all products. Limited time only!

Shop now!

Subject: Your Account Will Be Suspended

From: security@fake-bank.com

URGENT: Your account will be suspended unless you verify your information immediately.

Click here: [Link removed]

Subject: Opportunity at StartupXYZ

From: hiring@startupxyz.com

Hi,

We're looking for a Full Stack Developer. Your background in React and Node.js caught our attention.

Interested in a chat?

Best,
Hiring Manager

Subject: Team Standup - New Time

From: team@company.com

Hi Team,

Starting next week, our daily standup will move from 9 AM to 10 AM.

See you then!
Team Lead

Subject: Final Exam Schedule

From: department@university.edu

Dear Students,

The final exam schedule has been posted. Please check the course website for your exam times and locations.

Good luck!
Department

Subject: API Documentation Question

From: developer@company.com

Hi,

I'm trying to integrate your API but the documentation seems incomplete. Can you provide more details on the authentication flow?

Thanks!

Subject: Payment Failed

From: billing@service.com

Hi,

Your recent payment failed. Please update your payment method to continue service.

Thanks!

Subject: Birthday Party Invitation

From: friend@email.com

Hey!

You're invited to my birthday party this Saturday at 7 PM. Hope you can make it!

Friend

Subject: Make Money Fast!

From: getrich@spam.com

Earn $5000 a week from home! No experience needed. Click here to start earning today!

Subject: Follow-up on Application

From: recruiter@tech.com

Hi,

Just following up on your application. We're still reviewing candidates and will get back to you soon.

Thanks for your patience!
Recruiter

Subject: Cancel Meeting

From: colleague@work.com

Hi,

I need to cancel our meeting tomorrow. Can we reschedule for next week?

Sorry for the short notice.

Colleague

Subject: Research Opportunity

From: professor@university.edu

Dear Student,

I'm looking for a research assistant for a project on machine learning. Are you interested?

Prof. Johnson

Subject: Feature Not Working

From: user@service.com

Hi,

The search feature isn't returning any results. Is there an issue?

Thanks!

Subject: Subscription Upgrade

From: billing@saas.com

Hi,

You've been upgraded to our Pro plan. Your new monthly charge will be $99 starting next month.

Thanks!

Subject: Thank You!

From: friend@email.com

Hi,

Just wanted to say thanks for your help last week. Really appreciate it!

Friend

Subject: You've Been Selected!

From: lottery@spam.com

Congratulations! You've been randomly selected to win a free iPhone! Claim now!

Subject: Referral Opportunity

From: recruiter@company.com

Hi,

Do you know anyone who might be interested in a Data Scientist role? We're offering a referral bonus.

Thanks!

Subject: Conference Call - Tomorrow

From: team@company.com

Hi,

Reminder: We have a conference call tomorrow at 3 PM to discuss the project timeline.

See you there!
Team

Subject: Scholarship Application

From: financialaid@university.edu

Dear Student,

Your scholarship application has been received. We'll notify you of the decision by January 15th.

Financial Aid Office

Subject: Data Export Issue

From: user@service.com

Hi,

I'm trying to export my data but the CSV file is corrupted. Can you help?

Thanks!

Subject: Annual Plan Discount

From: sales@company.com

Hi,

Save 20% by switching to our annual plan! Lock in your current rate for a full year.

Interested? Reply to this email.

Sales Team

Subject: Weekend Hike

From: friend@email.com

Hey,

Want to go hiking this weekend? Weather looks great!

Let me know!
Friend

Subject: Act Now - Limited Stock!

From: sales@spam.com

Only 3 left in stock! Buy now before it's too late! 50% off today only!

Subject: Interview Feedback

From: hr@company.com

Hi,

Thank you for interviewing with us. We've decided to move forward with other candidates, but we'll keep your resume on file.

Best of luck!
HR

Subject: All-Hands Meeting

From: ceo@company.com

Hi Team,

We're having an all-hands meeting this Friday at 2 PM. Please mark your calendars.

CEO

Subject: Library Book Due

From: library@university.edu

Dear Student,

Your library book is due in 3 days. Please return or renew it.

Library

Subject: Integration Help

From: developer@startup.com

Hi,

I'm integrating your service with our app. Can you provide example code for webhook handling?

Thanks!

Subject: Payment Confirmation

From: payments@service.com

Hi,

Your payment of $29.99 has been processed. Receipt attached.

Thanks!

Subject: Movie Night

From: friend@email.com

Hey,

Want to watch a movie this Friday? I'm thinking of seeing the new sci-fi film.

Friend

Subject: FREE GIFT INSIDE!

From: promotions@spam.com

Open this email to claim your FREE gift! Limited time offer! Don't miss out!

Subject: Contract Position

From: recruiter@agency.com

Hi,

We have a 6-month contract position that might interest you. It's remote and pays $80/hour.

Interested?

Recruiter

Subject: Training Session

From: hr@company.com

Hi,

Mandatory training session scheduled for next Tuesday at 10 AM. Please attend.

HR

Subject: Thesis Defense

From: advisor@university.edu

Hi,

Your thesis defense is scheduled for January 20th at 2 PM. Please confirm your attendance.

Advisor

Subject: Performance Issue

From: user@service.com

Hi,

The app is running very slowly. Is there a known issue?

Thanks!

Subject: Overdue Invoice

From: billing@company.com

Hi,

Your invoice #4567 is overdue. Please pay $150.00 to avoid service interruption.

Thanks!

Subject: Congratulations!

From: friend@email.com

Hey!

Just heard the great news! Congratulations on your new job!

So happy for you!

Friend

Subject: Your Package Has Arrived

From: delivery@spam.com

Your package has arrived! Click here to track: [Link removed]

Subject: Job Fair Invitation

From: career@university.edu

Hi,

You're invited to our annual job fair on January 15th. Many tech companies will be there!

Career Services

Subject: Project Deadline

From: manager@company.com

Hi Team,

Just a reminder: The project deadline is next Friday. Let's make sure we're on track.

Manager

Subject: Study Group

From: classmate@university.edu

Hi,

Want to join our study group for the final exam? We're meeting Wednesday at 6 PM.

Classmate

Subject: Account Locked

From: user@service.com

Hi,

My account got locked after too many login attempts. Can you help me unlock it?

Thanks!

Subject: Plan Change Confirmation

From: billing@saas.com

Hi,

You've successfully changed to our Basic plan. Your new monthly charge is $19.99.

Thanks!

Subject: Dinner Invitation

From: friend@email.com

Hey,

Want to grab dinner this Thursday? I know a great new restaurant.

Friend

Subject: Exclusive Deal Just For You!

From: deals@spam.com

As a valued customer, here's an exclusive 75% off deal just for you! Act now!

Subject: Thank You Note

From: recruiter@company.com

Hi,

Thank you for taking the time to interview with us. We really enjoyed speaking with you.

We'll be in touch soon!

Recruiter

Subject: Holiday Party

From: hr@company.com

Hi Everyone,

Our annual holiday party is this Friday at 6 PM. Hope to see you there!

HR Team

Subject: Research Paper Submission

From: conference@academic.org

Dear Author,

Your paper submission has been received. We'll notify you of the review results by February 1st.

Conference Committee

Subject: Two-Factor Authentication

From: user@service.com

Hi,

I'm trying to set up 2FA but the QR code isn't showing. Can you help?

Thanks!

Subject: Credit Applied

From: billing@service.com

Hi,

We've applied a $25 credit to your account. Thank you for your patience with the recent outage.

Billing Team

Subject: Game Night

From: friend@email.com

Hey,

Game night this Saturday at my place. Bring snacks!

Friend

Subject: You Have Unread Messages

From: notifications@spam.com

You have 5 unread messages! Click here to read them now!

Subject: Salary Discussion

From: hr@company.com

Hi,

We'd like to discuss the salary for the position. Are you available for a call this week?

HR

Subject: Client Meeting

From: sales@company.com

Hi,

We have a client meeting scheduled for next Monday at 2 PM. Please prepare the presentation.

Sales Team

Subject: Tutoring Available

From: tutor@university.edu

Hi,

I'm offering tutoring sessions for CS 101. $30/hour. Interested?

Tutor

Subject: Mobile App Crash

From: user@service.com

Hi,

The mobile app crashes every time I try to upload a photo. This started after the last update.

Can you fix this?

Thanks!

Subject: Pro-rated Refund

From: billing@service.com

Hi,

We've processed your pro-rated refund of $45.00. It should appear in your account within 5-7 business days.

Thanks!

Subject: Travel Plans

From: friend@email.com

Hey,

Planning a trip to Europe next summer. Want to join?

Friend

Subject: Your Order Is Ready!

From: shipping@spam.com

Your order is ready to ship! Click here to track: [Link removed]

Subject: Internship Program

From: hr@company.com

Hi,

We're accepting applications for our summer internship program. Applications close January 31st.

Interested?

HR

Subject: Team Building Event

From: hr@company.com

Hi Team,

We're organizing a team building event next month. Please vote on your preferred date.

HR

Subject: Graduation Ceremony

From: registrar@university.edu

Dear Graduate,

Your graduation ceremony is scheduled for May 15th at 2 PM. Please confirm your attendance.

Registrar

Subject: API Rate Limit

From: developer@startup.com

Hi,

I'm hitting the API rate limit. Can we discuss increasing my quota?

Thanks!

Subject: Annual Report

From: billing@service.com

Hi,

Your annual billing report is ready. Total charges for 2023: $1,200.00

Thanks for being a customer!

Billing Team

Subject: Housewarming Party

From: friend@email.com

Hey,

Just moved into my new place! Having a housewarming party this Saturday. Hope you can make it!

Friend

Subject: Last Chance - 90% Off!

From: sales@spam.com

This is your last chance! Get 90% off everything! Sale ends tonight!
